hero.headline: Meet your thinking partner.
hero.quote: OPERA turned my chaotic doubt into a clear decision structure in minutes. Truly revolutionary.

agitation.headline: You already know the answer. You just can't hear it.

card1.label: browser tabs
card1.desc: Reddit threads, TikTok takes, WhatsApp polls

card3.label: Decision fatigue
card3.desc: You pick randomly. Or nothing at all.

step1.label: STEP ONE
step1.title: You dump everything
step1.desc: Externalize the noise. No structure needed, just raw thought.
step1.placeholder: I don't know if I should quit my job or...

step2.label: STEP TWO
step2.title: OPERA reads between the lines
step2.desc: We detect contradictions and emotional vectors you might have missed.
step2.conflict: Potential Conflict: Optimizing for security while desiring high-risk growth.

step3.label: STEP THREE
step3.title: Your council debates
step3.desc: Archetypes tailored to your problem challenge your options from multiple angles.
step3.stoic: "What is the worst case if you stay? Regret is a permanent tax on your peace."
step3.vc: "Opportunity cost is higher than the risk of failure here. Scale the upside."

step4.label: STEP FOUR
step4.title: You commit with clarity
step4.desc: A finalized recommendation and action steps. No more half-measures.

social.label: WHAT PEOPLE ARE SAYING
social.quote1: I was going in circles for 3 weeks. OPERA surfaced a conflict I hadn't consciously noticed.
social.quote2: The council debate format made me realize I was optimizing for the wrong thing entirely.
social.quote3: Committed to a decision I'd been avoiding for 6 months. In one session.

faq.title: Before you ask.
faq.q1: Is this just another AI chatbot?
faq.a1: No. OPERA runs a structured multi-perspective debate, not a single response. Think less ChatGPT, more structured devil's advocate.
faq.q2: What kind of decisions does this work for?
faq.a2: Career moves, creative direction, financial choices, relationship crossroads. Any decision where you know the options but can't commit.
faq.a3: Your mind dumps are yours. We don't train on your sessions.

Error.title: SOMETHING WENT WRONG
Error.sub: Errors like this are logged. If it keeps happening, something's wrong on our end.
Error.profiler_failed: OPERA couldn't read your dump. Try again with more detail.
Error.timeout: This took too long. The council may be stuck.
Error.not_found: This session doesn't exist or isn't yours.
Error.rateLimit: Please wait an hour to chat again.
Error.verdictUnavailable: Sorry, a verdict couldn't be reached within the allotted time. You can try again in the next hour.

notFound.title: 404 NOT FOUND
notFound.sub: You may have followed a broken link.

MindDump.title: What's going on?
